domain_shift_notes: Converted from video tracks_bbox to YOLO bbox. Sparse/medium density; no age or weight ground truth.
Roboflow segmentation converted to bbox. Two classes healthy/sick; very sparse, usually one object per image. Use as limited-use robustness case, not density case.
Broiler-specific Roboflow segmentation converted to bbox. Dense enough for image-level relative anomaly.
General chicken counting dataset. Mixed resolutions; useful domain-shift/counting case.
Dense chicken detection dataset. Many resolutions; useful high-density generalization case.
